title: Satriano goal stuns Real Madrid
fullText: Real Madrid miss the chance to move within one point of La Liga leaders Barcelona after Martin Satriano's spectacular strike givse Getafe a shock win at the Bernabeu.Match Report: Real Madrid 0-1 GetafeAvailable to UK users only.
summary: Real Madrid miss the chance to move within one point of La Liga leaders Barcelona after Martin Satriano's spectacular strike givse Getafe a shock win at the Bernabeu.
